name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes - 12 Dec 2023
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have made some layout and UI modifications to our Email Campaign Custom Report."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about this feature, read ahead!! "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Initially, while generating a one-time schedule report, in the Report Details section of step 2, the overall UI interface would appear cluttered and not so easy to follow, thus causing the report-creation process to be quite taxing and time-consuming."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To streamline the process, we have updated the UI fields and clubbed the campaign types into one single field."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep18.0685g00000Io3luAAB.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep18.0685g00000Io3luAAB.png","name":"custrep18","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1090,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Hence, from now on, users can simply choose the campaign type from the list and select the brands, names, and campaign tags, respectively."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep20.0685g00000Io3mEAAR.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep20.0685g00000Io3mEAAR.png","name":"custrep20","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1514,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Also, we have a preview mode wherein you can have a sneak peek at all the selection criteria you have chosen to generate the custom email report. "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep21.0685g00000Io3mTAAR.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/custrep21.0685g00000Io3mTAAR.png","name":"custrep21","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":533,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Custom-Email-Campaign-Report","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Email Report","bold":true}]},{"text":" topic."}]}]}]
